data.title: TON expected to surge past $1.50 in 10 days as 55% long positions show bullish breakout towards $1.50-$1.55 by month-end.
data.description: With smart money holding a 55% long position and managing to absorb aggressive selling, ideal breakout conditions have been established for TON. This indicates a potential surge towards the $1.50-$1.55 range by the end of the month.

data.title: SHIB price expected to hit $0.0000050 as technical setup weakens, with potential breakdown to support. Bulls need $0.0000070 resistance.
data.description: The MACD divergence and stagnant momentum of SHIB at $0.00000602 suggest a potential drop towards the $0.0000050 support level. The cryptocurrency is expected to trade sideways until there is a resurgence in buying interest to surpass the $0.0000070 resistance mark. A significant volume increase would be required for the bulls to reclaim control.

data.title: $71M in ETH frozen by Arbitrum due to Kelp DAO hack, sparking debate on Layer 2 decentralization and governance powers.
data.description: A total of 30,766 ETH linked to the $293 million Kelp exploit was frozen by Arbitrum's security council. This action has ignited discussions regarding the level of decentralization and governance abilities within Layer 2 protocols.

data.title: Death cross signals $0.18 target as bullish sentiment wanes post breach of $0.25 support.
data.description: The technical analysis of stock WLD indicates a significant drop below the support level of $0.25, leading to a projected decline to around $0.18. The momentum appears depleted, and distribution patterns validate the bearish trend. Additionally, the occurrence of a death cross formation indicates a potentially sustained downward movement...

data.title: SUI at $0.94 faces key level; $1.05 breakout favored in 72hrs despite $0.85 breakdown risk. Whales long, shorts pay premium.
data.description: The cryptocurrency SUI is currently trading at around $0.94, with large investors holding significant long positions while short sellers are paying extra to bet against it. The technical analysis suggests a potential rise to $1.05 in the next three days, although there is a possibility of a drop to $0.85.

data.title: Stock expected to hit $0.15 before dropping to $0.08. Distribution phase seen, despite bullish stance.
data.description: The possibility of a false breakout is indicated by a setup aiming for a resistance level of $0.15, preceding an anticipated decline to $0.08. Negative funding rates affirm the distribution phase, despite a bullish stance.

data.title: Whale accumulation at 2:1 long ratio pushes ARB towards $0.20+, supported by breakout above moving averages. Retail observes sidelines.
data.description: After breaking above important moving averages, ARB is seeing smart money taking a nearly 2:1 long-short stance. The technical analysis suggests a potential increase to over $0.20 in the coming weeks, with retail investors currently staying on the sidelines.

data.title: Breaking: Aptos surpasses $0.94 resistance with 66% institutional backing. $1.20 target imminent amid strong buying.
data.description: Aptos has successfully surpassed a crucial resistance level at $0.94, driven significantly by institutional investors who hold a dominant 66% long position in the stock. With this momentum, analysts anticipate a rise to $1.20 in the next 30 days, as the buying demand is expected to outweigh selling pressure.

data.title: XLM surpasses $0.18 mark, eyes $0.20 in 10 days as momentum strengthens and resistance diminishes.
data.description: Stellar successfully broke through the $0.18 mark decisively following a period of consolidation that lasted for weeks. This breakthrough is seen as paving the way for a potential rise towards $0.20, as momentum gains strength and the resistance levels above decrease.
ECB’s Nagel stresses the need to guard against misuse of artificial intelligence systems.

data.title: Implantica announces landmark RefluxStop® study of 602 patients across 22 European centers, with up to 6.75-year follow-up, published in Nature's Scientific Reports
data.description: On April 21, 2026, in Vaduz, Liechtenstein, Implantica AG (publ.), a leading medtech company, unveiled the RefluxStop® device to tackle acid reflux. The device represents cutting-edge technology being incorporated into the human body. Acid reflux is a prevalent condition globally, impacting more than 1 billion individuals.

data.title: Sinch named 2026 Adobe Customer Experience Orchestration Technology Partner of the year
data.description: In a press release from Stockholm on April 21, 2026, Sinch was revealed as the recipient of the prestigious title of the 2026 Adobe Customer Experience Orchestration Technology Partner of the year. This accolade highlights Sinch's ongoing prominence in enabling brands to provide seamless, immediate customer experiences.

data.title: H+H International A/S: Notification to the Polish Competition Authority by Solbet Sp. Z o.o.
data.description: On April 21, 2026, in Copenhagen, Denmark, H+H International A/S received notification that Solbet Sp. Z o.o., a shareholder and key competitor in Poland, has submitted an application to the Polish competition authority seeking permission for acquiring control of a certain entity. H+H is closely monitoring this development which could impact the competitive landscape, considering Solbet's significant presence in the market. This move signifies a potential shift in ownership within the industry.
China’s finance ministry plans to issue 30bn yuan of 91-day bills via auction on April 22.
Airbus says it is boosting sovereign cyber capabilities through the acquisition of French firm Quarkslab.

data.title: Circus Reports Strong Q1 2026 Operational Progress, Accelerates Defence Growth and Expands Product Portfolio
data.description: A global AI-robotics company, Circus SE, recently shared highlights from its Q1 Quarterly Operational Update Call. The company, listed under ISIN: DE000A2YN355 and XETRA: CA1, reported notable achievements in deployments, production scaling, AI advancements, and expansion within the defense sector. They highlighted substantial progress during the first quarter, attributing it to successful deployments and operational data. Circus witnessed significant growth as they shifted from research and development to serial deployment, marking it as their most successful quarter yet.

data.title: Faraday Future Partners with U.S. Education Institution Triple I to Launch the EAI Robotics Summer Camp in the United States, Advancing “Robot & Vehicle + Education” Scenario Deployment
data.description: Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (NASDAQ: FFAI), a California-based global company specializing in Embodied AI (EAI), has revealed a new collaboration. They have partnered with Triple I, an educational institution, to introduce an Embodied AI robotics summer camp in the US. This strategic partnership signifies a major step for Faraday Future's EAI Robotics division and aims to enhance collaboration within the EAI education sector. This initiative marks the first of its kind for FF's EAI Robotics business, showcasing their commitment to educational innovation.
Hamilton Global Opportunities plc (ALHGO.PA) released its 2025 full-year financial results and activity report.
Mizan: Iran executes man over alleged Israel ties and mosque arson during January protests.
UK government: Electricity Generator Levy on excess profits raised to 55% from 45% with immediate effect.
